description: Create a fully-constrained 2D layout of a NEMA 23 stepper motor mounting pattern centered at the origin (0,0). The layout must feature a 47.14 mm x 47.14 mm construction-line square with 5.0 mm diameter circles at each corner. Include a central 38.1 mm diameter circle centered at the origin. Save the completed sketch to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/nema23_layout.slvs.
